title: Will Huntington Ingalls (HII) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: HII is Awarded $79 Million Missile Defense Agency Technical Services Contract
text: MCLEAN, Va., Oct. 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Mission Technologies division was awarded a $79 million contract to support the Missile Defense Agency's (MDA) mission to develop, test and field a missile defense system that will protect the U.S. and its allies against enemy ballistic missile attacks.

title: Will Segmental Sales Aid Huntington's (HII) Q3 Earnings?
text: Huntington's (HII) third-quarter results are likely to reflect a strong performance across its business segments.

title: Media Advisory: Media Invited to Celebration of Newport News Shipbuilding Norfolk Campus
text: NORFOLK, Va., Oct. 26, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- What:   HII (NYSE: HII) will celebrate the opening of the Newport News Shipbuilding Norfolk Campus.

title: Earnings Preview: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: HII Names Paul Tennant as Corporate Vice President of Engagement and International Government Relations
text: ARLINGTON, Va., Oct. 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global all-domain defense provider HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that Brig. Gen. Paul Tennant (British Army, Ret.) has been named corporate vice president of engagement and international government relations. He will succeed Joe Tofalo, who will retire in December after five years with the company and 35 years in the U.S. Navy. Tennant will be located in HII's Arlington office and report directly to Stewart Holmes, HII's executive vice president of government and customer relations (GCR).

title: HII to Provide Readiness and Training Software Development Support for the U.S. Navy
text: MCLEAN, Va., Oct. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Mission Technologies division was awarded a $134 million contract to provide readiness and training software development support for the U.S. Navy.

title: HII Partnerships Celebrate Workforce Development Milestones
text: MCLEAN, Va., Oct. 19, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Two HII (NYSE: HII) partnerships recently celebrated important milestones that illustrate HII's commitment to building and supporting the education and training of a future nuclear workforce.

title: HII Expands Presence with New Advance Technology Facility in Downtown Syracuse
text: SYRACUSE, N.Y., Oct. 18, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Mission Technologies division hosted a ceremony to mark the opening of the company's new engineering facility in Syracuse, expanding the company's presence in the region.

title: HII is Awarded $244 Million Contract to Integrate Minotaur Software Products into Maritime Platforms
text: MCLEAN, Va., Oct. 17, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Mission Technologies division was awarded a $244 million task order to integrate Minotaur software products into maritime platforms for the U.S. Navy, U.S. Marine Corps and U.S. Coast Guard.

title: HII Delivers National Security Cutter Calhoun (WMSL 759) to U.S. Coast Guard
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Oct. 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division has delivered national security cutter Calhoun (WMSL 759) to the U.S. Coast Guard. Delivery documents signed Friday mark the official transfer of the ship from HII to the Coast Guard.

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Wins $347M Deal to Aid Lionfish Program
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) is set to build small unmanned undersea vehicles (SUUV) for the Lionfish System program, supporting the U.S. Navy's expeditionary marine countermeasure missions.

title: HII is Awarded $347 Million U.S. Navy Lionfish Small UUV Contract
text: Contract includes initial build of nine UUVs with potential for up to 200 Contract includes initial build of nine UUVs with potential for up to 200

title: Israel-Hamas War to Change Sentiment on Defense Stocks
text: Wall Street analysts generally feel the direct impact of the conflict on defense stocks will be small, but will improve the way investors view the sector.

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Surges 9.3%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock suggests that there could be more strength down the road.

title: HII Announces Vice President of Trades at Newport News Shipbuilding
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Oct. 09, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that David Horne has been promoted to vice president of trades at its Newport News Shipbuilding division.

title: Huntington (HII) Unveils New Amphibious Assault Ship LHA 8
text: Huntington's (HII) business segment, Ingalls Shipbuilding, launches an amphibious assault ship, Bougainville, for Navy and Marine Corps partners.

title: Huntington Ingalls: A Great Long-Term Opportunity For The Next Recession
text: Sleeping well at night in the next recession is a lot easier with safe dividends, a strong balance sheet, and a wide moat. Huntington Ingalls is the biggest navy shipbuilder in America, the king of nuclear subs, a completely recession-resistant industry. HII is finally undervalued after a post-Ukraine invasion rally and now offers a 17% annual return potential over the next two to 10 years.

title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding Launches Amphibious Assault Ship Bougainville (LHA 8)
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., Oct. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division announced the successful launch of the Navy's third America-class amphibious assault ship Bougainville (LHA 8) from its floating dock into the Pascagoula River on Saturday.

title: HII Elects Craig Faller to Board of Directors
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Oct. 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that Adm. Craig S. Faller (U.S. Navy, Ret.) was elected to the company's board of directors, effective Oct. 3, 2023.

title: HII to Host Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on Nov. 2
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., Oct. 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) will release its third quarter 2023 financial results on Thursday, Nov. 2 and host an earnings conference call at 9 a.m. Eastern time the same day. The call will be webcast live on HII's website: https://www.hii.com/.

title: Defense Stocks and the McCarthy Mess. What It Means for Investors.
text: The House of Representatives' historic vote to remove its speaker will complicate the sector over the next few months.
